title: Velveeswarar Temple
tagline: Velveeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Velveeswarar Temple, also known as Agasteeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple in Chennai, India.
overview.description: Velveeswarar Temple, also known as Agasteeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple in Chennai, India. Situated adjoining the Arcot Road in the neighbourhood of Valasaravakkam, the temple encloses a large pond and is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Valasaravakkam
topPlaces.description: Valasaravakkam is a neighbourhood in the Chennai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu and a residential suburb of the city of Chennai. It is located in the Maduravoyal Taluk at a distance of approximately 15 kilometres from the Kilometer Zero stone.

topPlaces.name: Virugambakkam
topPlaces.description: Virugambakkam is a residential neighbourhood of Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. It is an important residential area of and is famous for its schools, market, residential colonies and residences of film artists.

topPlaces.name: Alwarthirunagar
topPlaces.description: Alwarthirunagar is an urban locality in Chennai, the capital city of Tamil Nadu, India. Alwarthirunagar's PIN code is 600087 and the postal head office is in Valasaravakkam.

topPlaces.name: Alapakkam
topPlaces.description: Alapakkam (Tamil: [aːlappaːkkam]) is a neighbourhood in western part of Central Chennai. It belongs to Central Chennai Revenue Division of Chennai district.

topPlaces.name: Karambakkam
topPlaces.description: Karambakkam is a census town in Chennai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Recently buildings along Arcot road located at Karambakkam were demolished to provide space for the Chennai metro project.

topPlaces.name: DLF Cybercity Chennai
topPlaces.description: DLF Cybercity is an multiblock Information technology (IT) SEZ, developed by DLF a commercial real estate developer. DLF Cybercity is located on the 100 ft.

topPlaces.name: MGR Nagar
topPlaces.description: M.G.R. Nagar (shortened from M. G. Ramachandran Nagar) is a neighbourhood located in Chennai, India. The area is known for its busy vegetable market and fish market.

topPlaces.name: Vanagaram
topPlaces.description: Vanagaram, which is pronounced as Vaanagaram, is a residential neighborhood in Chennai, Tamil Nadu India. It is in North-East of Chennai and the fastest developing parts of the city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Velveeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Velveeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Velveeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Velveeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Velveeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Velveeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Velveeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Velveeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Valasaravakkam, Virugambakkam, Alwarthirunagar, Alapakkam, Karambakkam.
